summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 7 features: Email/password client auth replacing Google OAuth, auto-account creation on booking, password change, profile name editing, and pricing updates. All 19 backend API tests pass. All frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login works with valid credentials (testclient@example.com / NewPass456)
POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for invalid credentials
POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for non-existent email
GET /api/auth/me returns user data when authenticated via cookie
GET /api/auth/me returns 401 when not authenticated
POST /api/auth/logout clears session
POST /api/auth/change-password changes password correctly
POST /api/auth/change-password fails with wrong current password (400)
POST /api/auth/change-password requires authentication (401)
PUT /api/auth/profile updates client name
PUT /api/auth/profile requires authentication (401)
POST /api/bookings auto-creates client account with account_created=true for new email
POST /api/bookings does NOT create duplicate account for existing email (account_created=false)
Quick Aerial package has NO video feature ($199)
Aerial Plus package has cinematic video but NO FPV flythrough ($299)
FPV Showcase package has FPV fly-through ($649)
Fleet shows BetaFPV Pavo 20 Pro (DJI O4 Pro)
GET /api/bookings requires authentication (401)
Admin login still works (isaacsarver100@gmail.com)
Client login page at /login renders with email/password form
Header shows 'Client Login' link that navigates to /login
Dashboard redirects to /login if not authenticated
Client dashboard shows SKYLINE Media branding
Dashboard profile page has password change form (current, new, confirm fields)
Dashboard profile page has edit name feature
Homepage renders with correct hero and Central Alberta location
seed_data_creation: None - test client account already exists from previous booking API test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features verified working: (1) Google OAuth REMOVED - replaced with email/password client auth, (2) Client login at /login with email/password form, (3) Auto-account creation on booking (account_created=true for new emails, false for existing), (4) Password change from /dashboard/profile, (5) Profile name editing with Edit button, (6) Dashboard redirects to /login when not authenticated, (7) Header shows 'Client Login' link, (8) Pricing updated: Quick Aerial $199 (no video), Aerial Plus $299 (cinematic video, no FPV), FPV Showcase $649 (has FPV), (9) Fleet shows BetaFPV Pavo 20 Pro (DJI O4 Pro). Email notifications remain MOCKED when SMTP not configured.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email notifications (including auto-created account credentials) fall back to mock mode when SMTP is not configured. Credentials are logged to console.

client_email_password_auth.details: POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me, POST /api/auth/logout all working with httpOnly cookies

password_change.details: POST /api/auth/change-password validates current password and updates to new password

profile_name_edit.details: PUT /api/auth/profile updates client name, Edit button visible in dashboard

booking_auto_account_creation.details: POST /api/bookings creates account for new emails (account_created=true), skips for existing (account_created=false)

dashboard_auth_redirect.details: Dashboard redirects to /login when not authenticated

header_client_login_link.details: Header shows 'Client Login' link that navigates to /login page

pricing_updates.details: Quick Aerial: $199 (no video), Aerial Plus: $299 (cinematic video, no FPV), FPV Showcase: $649 (has FPV)

fleet_betafpv_update.details: Fleet shows 'BetaFPV Pavo 20 Pro (DJI O4 Pro)' on Home page
